postLists.content:
Dear students

Kindly submit your purple CBA notebook tomorrow in the class positively

Complete all the questions of Two stories about Flying in the notebook both the part .

Dear Parent,

The National Anveshika Experimental Skill Test 2026 (NAEST 2026) is conducted annually by the National Anveshika Network of India (NANI), a unit of the Indian Association of Physics Teachers, under the guidance of Prof H. C. Verma.

Students of Secondary and Senior Secondary classes are invited to participate in this initiative aligned with NEP, focusing on joyful, experiential, and competency-based learning.

There is no participation fee.

Detailed brochure and poster are attached for your reference.

Interested students to kindly fill the shared Google form by April 26, 2026.

https://forms.gle/o3G9PnQUjKLouYFz8

Regards

GDGPS,Sector 48

Dear Students, 
PFA of Preview/Review questions of Economics Chapter 1 Development
Thankyou

Summer Program at Pearl Academy

Students of Classes IX to XII have an opportunity to participate in a 10-day Summer Program offered by Pearl Academy, designed to introduce them to diverse creative disciplines through an immersive, on-campus experience.

Program Overview
The Summer Program enables students to explore fields such as AI, Business, Fashion, Styling, Interior & Product Design, and Communication. The focus is on experiential learning, creative exploration, and developing a foundational portfolio.

Eligibility
Classes IX – XII

Program Fee
₹15,000 + 18% GST
(Non-refundable)

Delhi Campus Details

  • Dates: 1st June to 12th June 2026
  • Duration: 10 Days
  • Time: 9:30 am – 3:30 pm
  • Venue: Pearl Academy Delhi West Campus

Registration Details

  • Last Date (Delhi Campus): 15th May 2026
  • Registration Link: https://www.pearlacademy.com/events/summer-at-pearl/2026

Program Highlights

  • Hands-on creative workshops
  • Mentorship from industry experts
  • Collaboration with like-minded peers
  • Final showcase of student work
  • Certificate of participation

This program provides students with early exposure to creative career pathways while strengthening their practical skills and creative thinking.

Dear Parents,

Kindly note that ESTP classes will not be conducted on 23rd and 24th April due to the Sports Fiesta in the school.

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation.

Thank you

GDGPS

postLists.content:
Dear Students,



Programme LEAD (Learning, Engagement, Action, and Development) – a dynamic Summer School at TERI School of Advanced Studies (TERI SAS), organized in collaboration with The Energy and Resources Institute (TERI). This immersive programme offers students a unique opportunity to interact with leading researchers and academics in the field of sustainability. Through a series of interactive workshops and engaging activities, participants will explore cutting-edge areas such as:



Data Science



Carbon Markets



Economics



Biotech



Climate Change



Design Thinking



Business



Sustainable Development Goals



We believe Programme LEAD will not only enrich your academic perspective but also inspire meaningful action through interdisciplinary learning.



Details for registration and fees may be found here:---- https://www.terisas.ac.in/summerschool-2026/

postLists.content:
Gentle Reminder

Inter-House Swimming Competition

Dear Students ,kindly ensure that you bring the consent slip duly signed by your parents. The consent form has already been uploaded on NLP.

House Meeting Coordinators

GD Goenka University Summer School 2026



Dear Students,



We are pleased to share an exciting opportunity from GD Goenka University — the Summer School 2026, scheduled from 28 May to 4 June 2026, for students aged 13–18 years.



This 8-day residential programme, “Innovate, Design & Thrive: Shaping Futures for Life,” offers a platform to explore future-focused disciplines through hands-on and experiential learning.



Programme Highlights:




  • 5+ hours of daily practical learning in AI, Aerospace, Design, and Culinary Arts

  • Access to advanced labs, workshops, and experiential projects

  • Soft skills development through theatre, music, calligraphy, fashion, and event management

  • Leadership exposure through planning the Culmination Day & Gala Dinner

  • Recreational outings and residential campus experience

  • Certificate upon successful completion



Courses Offered:




  • Brain & Bots – AI & Aerospace Innovation

  • Designing Futures – Creativity & Business with AI (UID)

  • Sustainable Hospitality – Culinary Arts, Flairology & Sustainability (in collaboration with Le Cordon Bleu India)



Set within a NAAC A+ accredited campus, the programme ensures quality infrastructure, experienced faculty, and a safe residential environment.



Programme Fee: ₹45,000 (inclusive of accommodation, meals, and academic materials)



Additional Benefits:




  • Early bird discount on registrations

  • 50% Summer School fee refund for students enrolling at GD Goenka University in 2026*



Registration Link: https://forms.gle/3MZJYaLPgqrFYrEa8



Students interested in exploring new-age career pathways and gaining practical exposure are encouraged to apply.

postLists.title: Resource Published in CREATIVE WRITING,LETTER TO EDITOR

postLists.content:
Dear Students,



We are pleased to share an exciting opportunity offered by ThinkStartup — the Young CEO Program, a 4-day entrepreneurship bootcamp hosted at Research & Innovation Park, IIT Delhi.



This program is ideal for students interested in innovation, entrepreneurship, and solving real-world problems.



Program Details:




  • Venue: IIT Delhi (R&I Park)

  • Duration: 4 Days

  • Timings: 9:30 AM – 4:30 PM



Available Batches:




  • 29 May – 1 June

  • 2 June – 5 June

  • 26 June – 29 June



Key Highlights:




  • Develop and present a business idea

  • Pitch in a Shark Tank–style finale

  • Learn from startup founders and industry experts

  • Certificate in Entrepreneurship (with TIDES IIT Roorkee)

  • Opportunity for recognition and portfolio building



Apply Here: https://bit.ly/K_NCR_MARCH26



Interested students are encouraged to explore this opportunity and apply at the earliest.
